channel.title: 🆕 Updates on Jonas B. Skånøy
channel.description: Recent content in 🆕 Updates on Jonas B. Skånøy

item.title: My thoughts on this semester
item.description: This semester is going to be my final one as a bachelor student in philosophy! Am very excited to get started, and whilst what comes after is uncertain, I am very grateful for the chance I’ve been given to actually just study something for the sake of liking the subject. I am grateful for having a stable and safe family dynamic, who I can rely on both emotionally, but also with regards to practical manners.

item.title: Welcome to the blog
item.description: So, it’s about time for me to start blogging! I’ve been putting off the idea for quite some time now (Just wanted everything else on the site to be in order first), but finally I am doing it. I’ll for the most part make blog posts on things that interested me - that being continental philosophy -, and technologies that takes my attention. I will also be posting updates to the sites here, when that’s necessary.
